name: Landing — SaaS
description: Full landing page for a SaaS product. Composes hero + social proof + three-pillar value prop + alternating feature deep-dives + stats + testimonial slider + final CTA. Feature-heavy storytelling flow, clean sans-serif defaults.

heroTitle.label: Hero headline
heroTitle.default: Ship your next release without breaking the last one

heroBody.label: Hero supporting text
heroBody.default: A release platform that catches regressions before they reach prod. Integrates with your existing stack in minutes, not weeks.

logoWallTitle.label: Logo wall title
logoWallTitle.default: Trusted by teams shipping at scale

pillarsSubtitle.label: Value-prop subtitle
pillarsSubtitle.default: Six capabilities, one platform, zero yak-shaving

featuresTitle.label: Feature deep-dive title
featuresTitle.default: Built for the way shipping actually works

statsTitle.label: Stats title
statsTitle.default: The numbers teams see after switching

ctaSubtitle.label: Final CTA subtitle
ctaSubtitle.default: Free for teams up to 10. No credit card required.
